title: Vanilla Connected Textures
description: Connected Textures that don't require OptiFine or any other mods!
body:
This is a texture pack that makes various textures connected, but does not require OptiFine or any other mods!\
It works with metals and gems, polished stones, and sandstones.\
Due to the vanilla methods being used, there is an unresolvable feature where the blocks connect to any block (apart from leaves, glass, iron bars etc.), but it still looks good!\
I have also optimized the pack to the limit, so you shouldn't expect any performance impact!\
This doesn't work with any resource pack yet (apart from bookshelves and sandstone blocks), but that's because the connected textures looked awful when I tried.\
The bookshelves look amazing, especially in stronghold libraries!\
![Vanilla Connected Textures](https://i.postimg.cc/rwGbm9GT/2025-02-11-19-57-49.jpg)\
It works by cullfacing sides the opposite way, meaning it will look connected.\
Enjoyed this pack? Check out my [Vanilla Connected Glass](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/vanilla-connected-glass) pack as well!\
Enjoy!
